overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through an outdoor Mediterranean-style restaurant patio. The character moves from a grassy lawn across paved tiles with dining tables, passing seated NPCs, then exits through a covered stone archway corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: manicured lawn approaching outdoor restaurant patio

events.description: steps from grass onto paved patio tiles with red patterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the lawn toward the outdoor dining area of a Mediterranean-style restaurant

entered.detail: cream-colored stucco building with large rounded arches and ivy-covered walls
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the edge of the property
large white canvas umbrellas shading outdoor tables
neatly manicured green hedges bordering the patio

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a sunny grassy lawn toward a Mediterranean-style restaurant building with arched doorways. Tall cypress trees line the left side while trimmed hedges border the right. White umbrellas and red tables are visible ahead as the character steps onto the paved patio.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor restaurant dining area with tables and umbrellas

events.description: weaves between tables and chairs, adjusting path to navigate through the dining area
passes close to a standing NPC in a green shirt, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: navigating through the outdoor dining tables, passing seated patrons and weaving between umbrellas

notable_agents.action: seated at a table wearing a green shirt, looking around the patio
standing and walking toward the camera in a light blue shirt

entered.detail: large stone archway leading into the covered corridor of the building
tall metal heater with round top near the building columns
round tables covered with red and white striped tablecloths

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the busy outdoor dining area, weaving between white umbrellas and red-topped tables. Several NPCs are seated eating while others walk through the space. The stone archway entrance looms ahead as the character navigates around a standing patron in a green shirt.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone archway corridor leading to street

events.description: enters the covered stone archway corridor, leaving the open patio
approaching the bright exit from the shaded corridor creates strong contrast

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered archway corridor toward the street exit, passing a seated NPC on a bench

notable_agents.action: seated on a stone bench against the wall wearing a red shirt and straw hat

entered.detail: covered walkway with high vaulted ceiling and massive stone columns
tall green hedge visible through the archway exit
stone bench against the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shaded stone archway corridor with massive columns and red patterned floor tiles. A seated NPC rests on a bench to the left. The corridor opens ahead to a bright street exit framed by tall hedges, transitioning from the enclosed covered space back to outdoor light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open garden through a bustling restaurant patio and into a shaded stone corridor. It begins with the character walking across a sunny grassy lawn lined with cypress trees and trimmed hedges, moving steadily toward a Mediterranean-style building. As the character steps onto the paved patio, the scene shifts into a busy dining area filled with white umbrellas and red-topped tables where NPCs are eating and walking. The camera then follows the character as they navigate around patrons and approach a looming stone archway, transitioning from the bright sunlight into a shaded corridor with massive columns and red patterned floor tiles. Finally, the enclosed space opens up as the character passes a seated NPC on a bench and exits through the archway back into the outdoor light of a bright street framed by tall hedges.
